landing.title: Twist: Organized work communication for flexible teams
landing.text:
Twist: Organized work communication for flexible teams
Features
Benefits
Why async?
Pricing
Log in
Features
Benefits
Why async?
Pricing
Log in
Sign up now
Sign up now
Work communication that won’t distract you all day
Twist is an async messaging app that makes collaboration easy from anywhere by using threads to organize your conversations.
Play
“The best of email, chat, and forums (without all the bullshit)”
– Our customers
Organization
Twist threads never bury important information.
Twist keeps conversations organized and on topic with threads. No more chit-chat burying important work communication.
Play
Clarity
Break through team silos with structured channels.
Organize channels by topic, project, or client to create a central place to gain visibility on your team’s work.
Play
Focus
Help your team focus on the work that matters.
Instill more calm and less anxiety with smarter notifications. The inbox gathers threads in one place, allowing team members to easily prioritize what matters to them.
Play
Access
Give your team past context to learn from.
Quickly onboard new employees and easily share context to past decisions with easy-to-access threads.
Play
Communication
Talk one-on-one with messages, privately.
Use messages to continue the work banter with all the gifs and emojis you’re familiar with, iron out last-minute details, or give feedback.
Play
Automation
Plus all the integrations your team relies on.
Bring all your apps with you when you switch to Twist. Or go a step further and create your own custom automations.
Browse integrations
Fast Company
named Twist a World Changing Idea; here’s why our customers agree
Read customer stories
See the announcement
“My team switched from Slack to Twist and it's been a game changer. Conversations in threads stay organized and far more easily referenced.”
Daniel Kuney
General Manager at KGM Theatrical
“Twist is a lifesaver to reduce digital stress and the fear of missing out when you can’t read everything in a group chat.”
Thibault Seynaeve
Marketing Specialist at Groep Verellen
“Twist is the perfect tool for deep work in a team setting. You cannot see if people are online. You are encouraged not to notify everyone all of the time. There is no glowing green dot encouraging you to be ‘always on’. It’s got the balance just right.”
Richard Burton
CEO of Balance Software
“Slack had a lot of promise for us but quickly became a productivity and deep-thought killer. Switching to Twist transformed our globally distributed team. We are on different continents and closer than any team I’ve worked with.”
Lee Watanabe-Crockett
Founder of Wabisabi Learning
“My team switched from Slack to Twist and it's been a game changer. Conversations in threads stay organized and far more easily referenced.”
Daniel Kuney
General Manager at KGM Theatrical
“Twist is a lifesaver to reduce digital stress and the fear of missing out when you can’t read everything in a group chat.”
Thibault Seynaeve
Marketing Specialist at Groep Verellen
“Twist is the perfect tool for deep work in a team setting. You cannot see if people are online. You are encouraged not to notify everyone all of the time. There is no glowing green dot encouraging you to be ‘always on’. It’s got the balance just right.”
Richard Burton
CEO of Balance Software
“Slack had a lot of promise for us but quickly became a productivity and deep-thought killer. Switching to Twist transformed our globally distributed team. We are on different continents and closer than any team I’ve worked with.”
Lee Watanabe-Crockett
Founder of Wabisabi Learning
In Twist, “no” is a feature
Compare to Slack
No more need for back-to-back meetings
Gain more time in the day for deep work by swapping team meetings for async threads.
No “I’m available” status bubbles
Protect your team from design tricks that hijack their time and attention.
No stress-inducing notification dots
Keep your team in the flow without the pressure to respond now.
The bottom line: Twist means productivity over presence.
Sign up now
Not just an app but a movement
We’re on a mission to make sure the future of work doesn’t repeat the mistakes of the past.
About the async movement
What the heck is asynchronous communication anyway?
See what all the fuss is about
The flipped meeting model: a framework for avoiding meeting burnout
Learn which meetings to keep and which to turn async
3 time-tested systems for creating accountability on a remote team
Build a results-oriented work culture
Work async, not ASAP.

What Slack lacks
Learn more
Important information gets buried
Stressful pressure to respond ASAP
Key conversations get siloed
One line at a time, all the time
Built for shallow work and instant messaging
Prioritize shareholders over people
Exacerbates workplace inequities
Discussions stay on-topic & in context

Thoughtful conversations thrive in threads
Built for deep work and
async communication
Independent and bootstrapped
Increases hybrid and remote team member parity
Frequently asked questions
What happens to my threads and messages after a month in the free version of Twist?
In the free version of Twist, you won’t be able to view or search for thread comments and messages older than one month. However, all your team’s data will still be safely stored on our servers – nothing will ever be deleted. If you decide to upgrade to the Unlimited plan later, you and your team will have full access to your Twist history.
Will I lose my data if I downgrade from the Unlimited plan to the Free plan?
No, your data is never deleted from Twist. When you downgrade to the free version, your comments and messages older than a month will still be saved on our servers, but you won’t be able to view or search for them. If at some point you decide to re-subscribe to the Unlimited plan, you’ll regain access to your team’s full thread and conversation history.
What is a guest?
A guest is a limited team member who only has access to the specific channels to which they have been invited. A guest can be a single-channel or multi-channel guest based on how many channels they have been invited to. Guests will not be able to view, join or post in the rest of your team’s channels. Read all about
how guests work in Twist
.
How much does it cost to have guests on my Twist team?
When you’re using Twist’s free plan, all guests are free. However guests in the free plan can only view threads or messages that are less than one month old (like all team members in the free plan).

When you’re using the Unlimited plan, single-channel guests are free, but multi-channel guests are billed in the same way as team members.
We need to add new users to our team. How will that be billed?
When you add a new user, we’ll automatically make a prorated, one-time charge to your credit card. This will cover the new team member’s account for the remainder of the current billing period. After that, the full amount for an extra member will be added to your regular invoice.
Can I mix free members and Unlimited members together?
If your team is using the Unlimited version of Twist, you will be billed for every member and multi-channel guest that you invite to your team. Single-channel guests are always free.

If you’d like to work with some free members, you can
create a separate, free team
. You can invite your members there and they will be able to use Twist at no cost. It’s easy to
switch between multiple teams
from a single Twist account.
More about billing
.
Do you have enterprise pricing?
If you have more than 200 employees, we recommend reaching out to our customer team at
support@twist.com
. We’ll be happy to get you up and running.
Work async, not ASAP.

analysis.name: Twist
analysis.tagline: Organized work communication for flexible teams
analysis.value_proposition: Async messaging app that uses threads to keep team communication organized, on-topic, and distraction-free.
analysis.ideal_customer: Remote, distributed, and hybrid teams that want async, deep-work-friendly communication instead of real-time chat like Slack.

features.name: threads
features.description: Organized, on-topic conversations that don't bury important information.
features.evidence_quote: Twist keeps conversations organized and on topic with threads.

features.name: channels
features.description: Structured channels organized by topic, project, or client for team visibility.
features.evidence_quote: Organize channels by topic, project, or client to create a central place to gain visibility

features.name: inbox
features.description: Central place that gathers threads so members can prioritize what matters.
features.evidence_quote: The inbox gathers threads in one place, allowing team members to easily prioritize

features.name: smart notifications
features.description: Notifications designed for calm and focus rather than constant interruption.
features.evidence_quote: Instill more calm and less anxiety with smarter notifications.

features.name: direct messages
features.description: Private 1:1 messages with gifs and emojis for banter and quick feedback.
features.evidence_quote: Talk one-on-one with messages, privately.

features.name: guest accounts
features.description: External collaborators with limited access to specific channels only.
features.evidence_quote: A guest is a limited team member who only has access to the specific channels

features.name: single-channel guests
features.description: Free guest tier limited to one channel — always free even on paid plans.
features.evidence_quote: single-channel guests are free

features.name: multi-channel guests
features.description: Guests invited to multiple channels; billed like team members on paid plan.
features.evidence_quote: multi-channel guests are billed in the same way as team members

features.name: message history
features.description: Full comment and message history retention on paid plan; 1-month on free.
features.evidence_quote: Access full history of comments and messages

features.name: file storage
features.description: Upload and share files; capped on free plan, unlimited on paid.
features.evidence_quote: Up to 5 GB file storage / Unlimited file storage

features.name: search
features.description: Search across threads and messages within retention window.
features.evidence_quote: you won't be able to view or search for thread comments and messages older than one month

features.name: multi-team support
features.description: Switch between multiple Twist teams from a single account.
features.evidence_quote: It's easy to switch between multiple teams from a single Twist account.

features.name: no presence indicators
features.description: No online/available status dots — deliberately removed to avoid always-on pressure.
features.evidence_quote: No "I'm available" status bubbles

features.name: async communication
features.description: Product designed around asynchronous work rather than real-time chat.
features.evidence_quote: Twist is an async messaging app

features.name: move threads between channels
features.description: Reorganize threads by moving them between channels.
features.evidence_quote: Move a thread between channels

features.name: custom automations
features.description: Build custom automations via API for team-specific workflows.
features.evidence_quote: go a step further and create your own custom automations

features.name: developer api
features.description: Public API for building custom integrations and automations.
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate more calmly by connecting your app to Twist. Explore the API

features.name: scheduled threads
features.description: Schedule threads to be posted at a later time.
features.evidence_quote: Scheduled Threads — Automation

features.name: auto-reports
features.description: Automated recurring team reports.
features.evidence_quote: Auto-reports — Automation

features.name: team check-in
features.description: Automated team check-in prompts and standup-style updates.
features.evidence_quote: Team Check-In — Automation

features.name: thread templates
features.description: Reusable templates for recurring thread types.
features.evidence_quote: Templates — Automation

features.name: time zones
features.description: Display teammate time zones for distributed teams.
features.evidence_quote: Time Zones — Calendars

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Downloadable apps across platforms.
features.evidence_quote: Download Apps

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Product available in German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese (Brazil).
features.evidence_quote: Deutsch English Español Français Italiano 日本語 Português (Brazil)

features.name: priority support
features.description: Priority customer support on paid plan; standard on free.
features.evidence_quote: Priority support

features.name: gifs and emojis
features.description: Rich media reactions and expressions in messages.
features.evidence_quote: all the gifs and emojis you're familiar with

features.name: help center
features.description: Self-service documentation and onboarding guide (Twist Academy).
features.evidence_quote: Twist Academy — Not sure where to start? Have a look at our onboarding guide!

differentiators: Threads as primary organization primitive (vs. Slack's line-by-line chat)
No presence indicators / no green dots — deliberate anti-always-on design
Independent and bootstrapped by Doist (no VC pressure)
Built for deep work rather than shallow instant messaging
'In Twist, no is a feature' — positioned against Slack's design tricks

praised: "Conversations in threads stay organized and far more easily referenced." — Daniel Kuney, KGM Theatrical
"Lifesaver to reduce digital stress and the fear of missing out" — Thibault Seynaeve, Groep Verellen
"Perfect tool for deep work in a team setting... no glowing green dot encouraging you to be 'always on'" — Richard Burton, Balance Software
"Switching to Twist transformed our globally distributed team." — Lee Watanabe-Crockett, Wabisabi Learning

free_tier.limits: 1 month history, 5 integrations, 5 GB storage, up to 500 members, up to 500 guests

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 mo history, 5 integrations, 5 GB storage, 500 members/guests, standard support

tiers.name: Unlimited
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full history, unlimited integrations/storage/members/guests, priority support

pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing recommended for teams >200 employees (contact support@twist.com). Multi-currency billing (USD/EUR/GBP/DKK/NOK/BRL/SEK/JPY/CAD/AUD). Yearly vs monthly billing offered but discount % not disclosed on page. Single-channel guests always free even on paid plan; multi-channel guests billed as members. Prorated one-time charge on new user add-mid-cycle. Free members cannot mix with Unlimited members in same team — must create separate free team.
